holdings.infoBox: BMVP is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are NetApp stock at 2.70%, Cisco Systems at 2.70%, Jabil at 2.52%, Cummins at 2.38%, and Alphabet at 2.26%.

overview.description: The Invesco Bloomberg MVP Multi-factor ETF (BMVP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg MVP index. The fund tracks an equally-weighted index of US large-cap securities, selected by their fundamental and technical characteristics. BMVP was launched on May 1, 2003 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: PwC: Businesses more confident in ability to manage crisis
data.text: Bob Moritz, chairman of PwC, discusses his company's research that shows that although nearly 75% of CEOs expect global economic growth to decline, they are confident in their companies' abilities to ...

data.title: Why PwC Is Betting $12B on Strategic Makeover
data.text: Jun.17 -- Tim Ryan, PwC U.S. chairman and senior partner, discusses the accounting and consulting firm's planned $12 billion strategic revamp on "Balance of Power."
